title: IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome)
subtitle: Understanding and managing irritable bowel syndrome
description: Evidence-based information about IBS — subtypes, the low-FODMAP diet, treatment options, and myths vs. facts. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

guidelines.title: Canadian Association of Gastroenterology IBS Clinical Practice Guideline
